error_signature: data tables config is broken after update
title: Data tables configuration broken after n8n update
symptom: After updating n8n, the configuration for data tables in workflows appears broken, causing issues when trying to run them.
applies_when: Upgrading from an older version of n8n
not_this_if: No data tables are used in the workflows
The workflows were created in the same version
root_cause: When upgrading n8n, changes in the underlying structure or configuration requirements for nodes like data tables can lead to previously saved configurations becoming incompatible or inaccessible.
fix_steps: Open the workflow containing the data tables
Click the 'expand' button on each data table configuration form
Review and adjust the settings as needed
Save the workflow and try running it again
agent_instruction: Expand the data table configurations in your workflow and adjust them as necessary.
